title: Bhawani Waghjai Temple, Terav
tagline: Bhawani Waghjai Temple, Terav — spiritual town of Maharashtra

overview.short: The Shree Bhawani Waghjai Temple, Terav is a Hindu temple dedicated to the goddesses Bhawani and Waghjai.
overview.description: The Shree Bhawani Waghjai Temple, Terav is a Hindu temple dedicated to the goddesses Bhawani and Waghjai. It is located in village Terav, Taluka Chiplun, Dist. Ratnagiri, Maharashtra. The original temple was built circa 1860.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Kherdi
topPlaces.description: Kherdi is a census town in Ratnagiri in the Indian state of Maharashtra. It has Maharashtra Industrial Development Corporation (MIDC).

topPlaces.name: Pedhambe
topPlaces.description: Pedhambe is a village in Chiplun taluka of Ratnagiri district in the state of Maharashtra, India. The nearest town is Chiplun, approximately 10 km (6 mi) away.

topPlaces.name: Chiplun
topPlaces.description: Chiplun ( [t͡ʃipɭuːɳ]) is a city in Ratnagiri district in the state of Maharashtra, India. It is one of the financial and commercial hubs of Ratnagiri district, and the headquarters of Chiplun taluka.

topPlaces.name: Mirjoli
topPlaces.description: Mirjoli is a small village on the banks of the Vashishti River in the mandal of Chiplun, Ratnagiri district, Maharashtra.

topPlaces.name: Alore
topPlaces.description: Alore is a village in the Chiplun taluka of Ratnagiri district, Maharashtra, India. It lies on a bypass of the state highway linking the nearest town of Chiplun to Karad, and is located about 12.0 km (7.5 miles) east of the nearest town, that is Chiplun.

topPlaces.name: Gowalkot
topPlaces.description: Gowalkot is a small fort located on the southern bank of Vashishti River, about 10.0 km (6.2 miles) from Chiplun in Maharashtra, India. This fort is guarded by the river on three sides and a trench on the fourth side.

topPlaces.name: Shirgaon, Ratnagiri
topPlaces.description: Shirgaon is a village in the Ratnagiri district of the state of Maharashtra, India.

topPlaces.name: Pophali
topPlaces.description: Pophali is a panchayat town in Chiplun taluka of Ratnagiri district in Maharashtra, India. The town is known for its power plant, which is a part of the Koyna Hydroelectric Project.

items.note: Kherdi is a census town in Ratnagiri in the Indian state of Maharashtra. It has Maharashtra Industrial Development Corporation (MIDC).
Pedhambe is a village in Chiplun taluka of Ratnagiri district in the state of Maharashtra, India. The nearest town is Chiplun, approximately 10 km (6 mi) away.

Chiplun ( [t͡ʃipɭuːɳ]) is a city in Ratnagiri district in the state of Maharashtra, India. It is one of the financial and commercial hubs of Ratnagiri district, and the headquarters of Chiplun taluka.
Mirjoli is a small village on the banks of the Vashishti River in the mandal of Chiplun, Ratnagiri district, Maharashtra.

Alore is a village in the Chiplun taluka of Ratnagiri district, Maharashtra, India. It lies on a bypass of the state highway linking the nearest town of Chiplun to Karad, and is located about 12.0 km (7.5 miles) east of the nearest town, that is Chiplun.

Gowalkot is a small fort located on the southern bank of Vashishti River, about 10.0 km (6.2 miles) from Chiplun in Maharashtra, India. This fort is guarded by the river on three sides and a trench on the fourth side.
Shirgaon is a village in the Ratnagiri district of the state of Maharashtra, India.
Pophali is a panchayat town in Chiplun taluka of Ratnagiri district in Maharashtra, India. The town is known for its power plant, which is a part of the Koyna Hydroelectric Project.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Bhawani Waghjai Temple, Terav?
faq.a: The best time to visit Bhawani Waghjai Temple, Terav is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Bhawani Waghjai Temple, Terav?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kolhapur Airport (121 km) and the nearest railway station is Pune Junction (122 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Bhawani Waghjai Temple, Terav?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Bhawani Waghjai Temple, Terav at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Bhawani Waghjai Temple, Terav?
faq.a: Stays in Bhawani Waghjai Temple, Terav start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Bhawani Waghjai Temple, Terav?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kherdi, Pedhambe, Chiplun, Mirjoli, Alore.
